name: CYBERLOQ TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
business: CyberloQ Technologies is a development-stage technology company offering a proprietary multi-factor authentication software platform called CyberloQ to institutional clients for fraud prevention, and a web-based credit monitoring platform called TurnScor. The company also offers CyberloQ Vault, a cloud-based security protocol for secure data transmission. The company currently has two full-time employees and relies on raising capital to continue operations.

exposures.sentence: The Company offers a proprietary software platform branded as CyberloQ.
The Company is a development-stage technology company focused on fraud prevention and credit management.
